<par>This form is a bit tricky.  It looks like mú might actually mean ‘fire’, in which case there is a scribal error in the gloss note (i.e. perhaps the author intended m + 'smoke' but accidentally entered 'smoke' + m).  However, it is also possible that mú is a shortened form of mù khú  'smoke', in which case the gloss note is correct as entered.</par>
